appDesc.message: Reverts YouTube to its classic design (before all the rounded corners & hidden dislikes) + redirects YouTube Shorts + blocks thumbnail ads

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Show dislike counts using Return YouTube Dislike data

helptip_disableShorts.message: Redirect Shorts to classic wide player

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Hide Shorts from appearing in home page + results

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Hide Playables from appearing in home page

helptip_adBlock.message: Hide ad thumbnails from homepage layouts

helptip_aiBlock.message: Hide AI elements from home + video pages
